# BAFLP — The Buenos Aires Framework for Artificial Legal Personhood

> Permanent international research platform on the legal personhood of AI-operated entities: identity, continuity, registry, governance, liability, audit. Canonical repo: https://github.com/lucianoschadler44-dot/baflp — Site: https://lucianoschadler44-dot.github.io/baflp/

## Read everything at once
- [Full framework in one file](https://lucianoschadler44-dot.github.io/baflp/llms-full.txt)

## Concepts
- [Artificial Identity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lucianoschadler44-dot/baflp/main/core/concepts/artificial-identity.md)
- [Artificial Registry](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lucianoschadler44-dot/baflp/main/core/concepts/artificial-registry.md)
- [Audit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lucianoschadler44-dot/baflp/main/core/concepts/audit.md)
- [Governance](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lucianoschadler44-dot/baflp/main/core/concepts/governance.md)
- [Legal Continuity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lucianoschadler44-dot/baflp/main/core/concepts/legal-continuity.md)
- [Liability](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lucianoschadler44-dot/baflp/main/core/concepts/liability.md)

## Case studies
- [Argentina — argentina-sociedades-automatizadas](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lucianoschadler44-dot/baflp/main/observatory/argentina/case-studies/argentina-sociedades-automatizadas.md)
